title: Roasted Golden Dutch Pilaf
description: A flavorful side dish featuring roasted golden dutch grains, with a hint of grassy undertones.
instructions: In a large saucepan, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the Golden Dutch Grains and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the chicken broth, pilaf seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Bring to a boil, then cover and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast for 25-30 minutes, or until the grains are tender.
Fluff with a fork and serve.
